title: Featured accordion — layout pattern registry
description: Each entry is a distinct composition pattern for the same content model (eyebrow, heading, intro, CTA, N service items with image/title). Use layoutVariant in CMS JSON to pick one; implement as separate React subcomponents or a switch in featured-accordion.tsx.
reuseWorkflow: 1. Pick a pattern by id/slug from patterns[] below.

2. Copy the preview block for that pattern (section.fac-variant[data-pattern-slug]) into a new file under glc-site/src/components/sections/featured-accordion/layouts/<Slug>.tsx — translate class names to Tailwind or keep a scoped CSS module.
3. Add the slug to FeaturedAccordionLayoutVariant in types.ts if not already listed.
4. In featured-accordion.tsx, branch on props.layoutVariant and render the matching layout component; default remains split-copy-left-strip-right (production default).
5. In home.json (or CMS), set accordion.props.layoutVariant to the slug.
6. Keep this registry and the preview HTML in sync when adding patterns.

patterns.label: Split column — copy left, expanding strips right
patterns.structuralDNA: Desktop: text column | horizontal pickers that expand width on hover. Mobile: stacked.

patterns.label: Mirrored split — strips left, copy right-aligned
patterns.structuralDNA: Same strip behavior as p01 but column order and text alignment flipped.

patterns.label: Stack — full-width strip band, then copy
patterns.structuralDNA: Media/interaction row first (full width), typography block second. Reading order: see services, then read pitch.

patterns.label: Tab stage — tab row + single large image (not strip width)
patterns.structuralDNA: Explicit tabs; one stage image swaps object-position or src. No accordion strip widths.

patterns.label: Split — copy | stacked rows that grow in height
patterns.structuralDNA: Right column is horizontal strips replaced by vertical list: each row expands in height, not width.

patterns.label: River — alternating image/text rows
patterns.structuralDNA: Intro block then full-width rows; odd/even flip image vs copy (RTL trick on desktop).

patterns.label: Stage + filmstrip — hero image + thumb rail
patterns.structuralDNA: One dominant aspect-ratio stage; small thumbs below change the stage.

patterns.label: Bento — asymmetric grid with one hero cell
patterns.structuralDNA: Irregular grid: one cell spans multiple tracks; selection outline, not width tween.

patterns.label: Step rail — numbered steps + connector line + preview
patterns.structuralDNA: Horizontal numbered steps with visual connectors; preview image below (not overlapping cards).

patterns.label: Morph row — circles expand to rounded squares
patterns.structuralDNA: Circular thumbs that morph geometry on selection.

patterns.label: Diagonal split — charcoal copy panel | media rail
patterns.structuralDNA: Clip-path diagonal between copy and strip; strong editorial contrast.

patterns.label: Index rail — vertical 01–N beside copy + strips
patterns.structuralDNA: Fixed number column reads as table of contents; main area has copy then strips.

patterns.label: Bleed band — full-bleed image + overlapping card
patterns.structuralDNA: Edge-to-edge band; copy sits in lifted card overlapping band; strips below.

patterns.label: Editorial — long copy column | stacked squares
patterns.structuralDNA: Narrow image stack beside running copy; square tiles, not horizontal strip.

patterns.label: Equal five — uniform columns, border selection
patterns.structuralDNA: Five equal columns; no width animation — ring/border only.

patterns.label: 50/50 — half-bleed photo | copy + chip selectors
patterns.structuralDNA: Photo locks half viewport; text side uses compact chips to swap hero crop.

patterns.label: L-grid — one tall tile + four satellites
patterns.structuralDNA: CSS grid with explicit areas: dominant L + four smaller cells.

patterns.label: Hub — centered card; corners + fifth thumb
patterns.structuralDNA: Copy in center; four corner images; fifth item in auxiliary rail.

patterns.label: Masonry flow — column-balanced cards
patterns.structuralDNA: Multi-column masonry with varied heights; breaks from rigid strip rhythm.

patterns.label: Masthead — vertical side label + copy + bottom strip
patterns.structuralDNA: Vertical-rl label as spine; main copy; horizontal strip as footer band.
